name: com.tk.notification
description: Local mobile-notification framework: scheduling, quiet-hours, channels, permission and launch routing behind a testable seam — with a Unity Mobile Notifications backend and a no-op fallback on non-mobile targets.

samples.description: Editor-runnable demo with ContextMenu triggers and the engagement-funnel reschedule pattern.
Engagement-funnel builder, Remote Config quiet-hours bridge, and a launch router.
